reviews.comment:
Excelente todo. El café muy rico y los empleados,de lo mejor,si yo fuera el dueño de esa estación de servicio,me sentiría muy orgulloso de ellos.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent. The coffee was delicious and the employees were top-notch. If I owned that gas station, I would be very proud of them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMFlYOHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Re lenta la.carga siempre hay cola. Le falta poner dos playeros. No dan abasto en el verano

(Translated by Google)
The loading is so slow. There's always a queue. They need to hire two more staff. They can't keep up in the summer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMFl5U093EAE

reviews.comment:
Paso obligado para las vacaciones. Muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
A must-visit for vacationers. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3FLYVhREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros excelente.
Pero es vergonzoso que en plena temporada a las 22 hs. Tengan a una sola persona atendiendo la playa. Pobres empleados y la espera de la gente

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were excellent.

But it's shameful that at 10 PM, during peak season, they only have one person on duty. Poor employees and the wait for everyone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdXEydVB3EAE

reviews.comment:
Aunque las instalaciones no son modernas, el personal de playa tiene una gran predisposición para atender al viajero y un trato cordial permanente. Cuenta con una pequeña arboleda ideal para una parada de descanso

(Translated by Google)
Although the facilities aren't modern, the beach staff are very helpful and friendly. There's also a small grove of trees, perfect for a relaxing break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM0lDVkt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tendría que poner más personal por la madrugada se llena mucho y tardan en atender obviamente los empleados no dan a basto , paguen no sean ratas y pongan más gente a laburar !!

(Translated by Google)
I would have to add more staff in the early morning, it gets very busy and it takes a long time to serve, obviously the employees can't cope, pay, don't be cheap and put more people to work!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtelAtb3N3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Cobran con la app de YPF. No encontré todavía en Córdoba alguna estación que cobre con Cuenta DNI de Banco Provincia.

(Translated by Google)
They charge with the YPF app. I haven't found any stations in Córdoba yet that charge with Banco Provincia's DNI account.
